news.headline: Exelon Corp appoints Colette Honorable as new Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary, Gayle Littleton stepping down.
news.summary: Exelon Corp. (Nasdaq: EXC) based in Chicago disclosed plans to reorganize executive leadership by confirming the resignation of Gayle Littleton as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, and Corporate Secretary effective from Jan. 1. Littleton will transition into the position of Special Advisor to the CEO until March 31. Colette Honorable will take over the Legal Department in an enhanced capacity, being appointed as Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary. Honorable currently serves as Execu...

news.headline: Pioneer Power (Nasdaq: PPSI) to pilot project with Fortune 100 e-commerce retailer addressing power needs of EV fleet.
news.summary: A company known as Pioneer Power Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPSI) headquartered in Fort Lee, N.J., and specializing in distributed energy resources, power generation equipment, and mobile EV charging solutions, has introduced a pioneering pilot program in collaboration with a major Fortune 100 e-commerce corporation. This initiative aims to address the "grid gap" issue arising from the escalating power demands of the retailer's electric delivery fleet. By merging expertise in the development, manufacturing, servicing, and integration of various energy solutions, Pioneer is working towards providing a sustainable resolution. This novel program marks a significant step forward in the efforts to bridge the disparity between power requirements and available resources in the context of electric fleet operations.

news.headline: SingleStore appoints Andy Wild as new Chief Revenue Officer after a year of record growth, responsible for leading global sales teams.
news.summary: In San Francisco, SingleStore, a leading database and data platform enabling real-time data transaction, analysis, and search, revealed the appointment of Andy Wild as Chief Revenue Officer today. The decision comes amidst a highly successful year for SingleStore marked by record growth. With over 35 years of industry experience, Wild will oversee the global sales teams, spearheading efforts towards sustained growth and worldwide expansion under his leadership.

news.headline: Twelve Labs partners with AWS to enhance video search with AI, using AWS to scale its models.
news.summary: In an announcement made at AWS re:Invent in Las Vegas, Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS) revealed that Twelve Labs, a startup utilizing multimodal artificial intelligence (AI) to enhance video content comprehension, is advancing its proprietary foundation models on AWS. By leveraging AWS services, Twelve Labs aims to expedite the progression of its models that connect natural language with video content. This development signifies a strategic move for Twelve Labs in utilizing AWS technologies to enhance its AI capabilities and meet market demands efficiently.

news.headline: Renowned garden designer Lucy Hunter launches home décor business- The Flower Hunter in Charleston, SC with Studio Collections. #TheFlowerHunter.
news.summary: Renowned author and floral designer Lucy Hunter has revealed the debut of her home décor venture, The Flower Hunter, in Charleston, S.C. Having authored books such as The Flower Hunter: Creating a Floral Love Story and The Flower Hunter: Seasonal Flowers, Hunter brings her expertise to this new business. The launch features the Studio Collections, marking a significant expansion from her previous projects. The Flower Hunter offers a fresh take on home décor inspired by nature and garden landscapes.

news.headline: Amperity launches Customer Data Cloud to simplify data architectures with AI; data expected to increase 165% by 2028.
news.summary: In Seattle, Amperity introduced the Customer Data Cloud, utilizing AI to convert raw customer data in a data warehouse into valuable business assets through its Lakehouse architecture. Statista predicts a 165% growth in data creation, capture, and consumption by 2028. Many brands face challenges in quickly consolidating customer data to enhance customer insights.

news.headline: CAIS introduces enhanced trade solution for financial advisors, offering new capabilities to over 2,000 firms.
news.summary: CAIS, a prominent alternative investment platform for independent financial advisors, recently introduced enhanced trade capabilities for more than 2,000 wealth management firms using the CAIS alts operating platform. This new solution aims to streamline the alternative investment process for financial advisors by offering a more user-friendly and adaptable investment experience. The updated features are designed to simplify the alternative investment lifecycle and improve accessibility for users.

news.headline: ThredUp sells European business, Remix, in management buyout led by Florin Filote. ThredUp retains minority interest.
news.summary: ThredUp Inc., a major online resale platform for clothing, shoes, and accessories, has finalized the sale of its European business, Remix, in a management buyout led by Florin Filote, the current General Manager of Remix. The transaction, which includes a minority stake retained by ThredUp, was completed concurrently with the agreement signing. ThredUp is listed on the Nasdaq with the ticker symbol TDUP and also on the LTSE as TDUP.

news.headline: US tech investor Anzu Partners agrees to acquire voxeljet AG to boost 3D printing market. Purchase expected in March or April 2025.
news.summary: In Friedberg, Germany, voxeljet AG has recently announced that it will be selling its complete business to funds associated with Anzu Partners LLC through an asset deal. The transaction is anticipated to be finalized in March or April of 2025, pending customary closing requirements such as approval from voxeljet's General Meeting and foreign investment clearance in Germany. The General Meeting of voxeljet is scheduled to convene for this purpose.

news.headline: IMDb reveals top stars, movies, shows of 2024 based on page views from IMDbPro MOVIEmeter, STARmeter rankings.
news.summary: In Seattle, IMDb, the leading source for movies, TV shows, and celebrities, revealed the top stars, movies, and shows of 2024. Instead of relying on limited samples or critic reviews, IMDb's rankings are based on data from IMDbPro MOVIEmeter and STARmeter rankings, reflecting actual page views. The rankings provide insight into the most popular entertainment choices of the year. Visit www.imdb.com for comprehensive information.

news.headline: LibDib wins "Best Technology Innovation" award from Beverage Wholesaler for LibTech SaaS division.-Tech-focused alcohol distribution.
news.summary: A web-based alcohol distributor, LibDib based in SAN JOSE, Calif., has been honored for "Best Technology Innovation" by Beverage Wholesaler in their Distributor Best Practices Awards. This recognition highlights the company's dedication to revolutionizing the beverage alcohol sector with state-of-the-art technology, particularly their LibTech SaaS division. The accolade showcases the commitment of LibDib to innovation and industry advancement.

news.headline: Adobe and AWS team up to offer Adobe Experience Platform on AWS, allowing brands to enhance customer engagement.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, at AWS re:Invent, Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE) revealed an enhanced collaboration with Amazon Web Services (AWS) to launch Adobe Experience Platform (AEP) on AWS. This partnership enables brands to elevate customer connections with personalized experiences driven by in-depth insights. AEP provides a unified customer view during live interactions across various channels, distinguishing itself as the preferred solution for many.

news.headline: RRD launches ConnectOne Storefront to enhance operations, cut costs for brands. A web-based platform streamlines ordering, fulfillment & more.
news.summary: RRD, a prominent provider of marketing, packaging, print, and supply chain solutions, introduced ConnectOne Storefront, an online marketing and e-commerce platform for multichannel communications, in Chicago. This new platform aims to enhance operational efficiencies and lower expenses through streamlined ordering, fulfillment, content customization, and direct mail campaign management. ConnectOne Storefront is a significant advancement from RRD's previous e-commerce portal, CustomPoint.

news.headline: Wikimedia Deutschland partners with DataStax and NVIDIA AI to make Wikidata accessible, leveraging DataStax AI Platform.
news.summary: DataStax, based in Santa Clara, California, recently revealed that Wikimedia Deutschland has started utilizing the DataStax AI Platform, developed in collaboration with NVIDIA AI. This partnership aims to provide developers with access to Wikidata.

news.headline: Bojangles donates $150,000 to American Red Cross for Western North Carolina after Heart-Shaped Biscuit fundraiser success.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Bojangles has recently revealed the impressive results of its charitable initiative, the Heart-Shaped Bo-Berry Biscuit campaign aimed at aiding those affected by Hurricane Helene. The fundraising effort managed to raise a total of $150,000 for the American Red Cross. This substantial donation will be directed towards providing assistance to communities in Western North Carolina that were devastated by the storm. Bojangles’ CEO, Jose Armario, joined the efforts alongside customers, showcasing a powerful display of unity and support for their neighbors in need.

news.headline: Ideal Living certifies AquaTru water purifiers to remove microplastics; crucial for health as they are found in human organs.
news.summary: A company known as Ideal Living, which is responsible for AquaTru and AirDoctor, has recently revealed that its AquaTru water purifiers have undergone testing and received certification from IAPMO. These purifiers are confirmed to effectively eliminate microplastics from tap water. Microplastics, originating from plastic waste and industrial activities, have the ability to contaminate water sources, leading to potential health hazards for individuals globally. Recent studies conducted by the AAMC have discovered the presence of microplastics in various parts of the human body, including essential organs like the heart.

news.headline: LightForce Orthodontics ranked 47th on Deloitte Fast 500 with a 2,985% growth. CEO credits success to personalized 3D braces.
news.summary: LightForce Orthodontics, a pioneer in the 3D printed braces system industry, based in Burlington, Massachusetts, has achieved the 47th position in the prestigious Deloitte Technology Fast 500™ list. The list features the fastest-growing companies in various sectors including technology, media, telecommunications, life sciences, fintech, and energy tech across North America, marking its 30th year. LightForce witnessed remarkable growth, with a surge of 2,985% in this period. The company's success can be largely credited to its Chief Executive Officer and co-founder, Dr. Alfred Griffin III.

news.headline: Memphis Grizzlies partner with Shift4 for payment solutions at FedExForum, enhancing fan experience.
news.summary: The Memphis Grizzlies have recently revealed a long-term collaboration with Shift4, a top player in integrated payments and commerce technology, with an investment reported at over $FOUR. This partnership will see Shift4 taking charge of payment operations for the team along with various events hosted at FedExForum. As the designated point-of-sale partner of the Memphis Grizzlies, Shift4 is set to offer a range of payment processing tools aimed at streamlining processes and elevating the overall fan experience at FedExForum. Specifically, Shift4 will be handling transactions related to food and beverage concessions at the venue.

news.headline: Everstream Analytics appoints Ryan Elliott as COO, formerly senior partner at A.T. Kearney, known for founding PRISM.
news.summary: Everstream Analytics, a prominent company specializing in supply chain insights and risk analytics, has recently appointed Ryan Elliott as its new Chief Operating Officer (COO). Prior to this role, Elliott served as a senior partner at A.T. Kearney, a top global consulting firm, where he established PRISM. PRISM integrates supply chain software with expert consulting services to offer practical supply chain risk advice. With expertise in multi-tier discovery, Elliott aims to assist Everstream customers in optimizing their operations.

news.headline: Entravision appoints Jamil Downey as VP & GM Americas for Smadex to drive U.S. expansion. Leading media-tech company reports strong growth.
news.summary: Entravision, a prominent media and advertising technology firm listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol EVC, has named Jamil Downey as the Vice President & General Manager for the Americas region overseeing its mobile advertising and Connected TV technology platform, Smadex. In this role, Jamil will report to Chief Revenue Officer Phil Gontier and focus on driving Smadex’s expansion strategy in the United States. With this appointment, Entravision aims to capitalize on Smadex's strong growth trends and harness the company's broad market presence.

news.headline: Cleo updates Cleo Integration Cloud in 2024 with new procurement automation solutions to enhance supply chain orchestration.
news.summary: A recent announcement from Cleo in Chicago revealed updates to the Cleo Integration Cloud, a cloud-based platform catering to B2B integration. This latest update underscores Cleo's focus on procurement within supply chains. Cleo Integration Cloud aims to streamline and enhance B2B integration processes, offering businesses improved efficiency and connectivity.

news.headline: Kiro Race Co partners with CUPRA in Formula E, a multi-year deal in England.
news.summary: Kiro Race Co, a recently established Formula E team, has unveiled a lasting collaboration with CUPRA, their official Co-Title Partner. This partnership is set to extend over multiple years and promises to enhance the team's presence in the racing circuit.

news.headline: Consilio launches 'Native AI Review' for legal teams with control over data, integrating latest Large Language Model innovations, ensuring trusted AI Review and AI Privilege Log. Clients facing data conundrum.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Consilio, a prominent provider of legal technology solutions and enterprise legal services, introduced the comprehensive rollout of "Native AI Review." This solution is designed for legal review teams that prioritize data control and seamless integration with third-party review tools. Native AI Review leverages cutting-edge Large Language Model (LLM) advancements to offer AI Review and AI Privilege Log within a secure environment. As organizations confront a significant challenge, clients are embracing this innovative approach to legal review.

news.headline: SimpleTire donates $10,000 to charity: water for clean water project, aiding global water crisis.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, tire company SimpleTire has contributed $10,000 to charity: water, a nonprofit organization. The donation will be used to finance a clean water initiative, aiming to improve the lives of individuals and assist in eradicating the worldwide water scarcity issue.

news.headline: Amazon had its biggest Thanksgiving holiday shopping event ever, Black Friday & Cyber Monday week saw record sales and items. Millions of Echo and Fire TV devices sold.
news.summary: In Seattle, Amazon revealed that its Black Friday Week and Cyber Monday shopping event from November 21 to December 2 was the largest ever compared to previous years. The 12-day period ending on Cyber Monday saw record sales and the highest number of items sold. Customers purchased millions of Echo and Fire TV devices, with the latest versions of Echo Dot and Fire TV Stick 4K being the best-selling products during the event. The event took place in the U.S., with Amazon's stock being listed as NASDAQ: AMZN.

news.headline: Klick Health surprises team with AI-powered hugs in emotional video as 74% won't hug loved ones this holiday season.
news.summary: In Toronto and New York, a heartwarming video called "Holiday Hugs" has been released by Klick Health, featuring surprise reunions of dozens of team members who couldn't hug their loved ones during the festive season. The four-minute video, benefiting the Foundation for Social Connection (F4SC) based in D.C., showcases sentimental moments orchestrated using AI and other special methods. This initiative comes in light of a recent Maru/Blue Public Opinion survey commissioned by Klick, reflecting the importance of human connection during challenging times.

news.headline: DoiT launches DoiT Cloud Intelligence™ to enhance cloud optimization and troubleshooting for organizations; aims to prevent waste and enhance efficiency.
news.summary: DoiT, a technology company based in Santa Clara, has launched DoiT Cloud Intelligence™, a new solution aimed at optimizing cloud usage for businesses. This tool, developed by experienced cloud architects and engineers, helps organizations prevent wastage and troubleshoot cloud infrastructure efficiently. With DoiT Cloud Intelligence™, companies can enhance their cloud usage, minimize waste, and resolve complex issues quickly.

news.headline: KIOXIA's UFS 4.0 flash memory for automotive apps attains ASPICE L2 certification in San Jose.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, KIOXIA's automotive grade UFS 4.0 has recently obtained ASPICE Level 2 certification.

news.headline: Holiday shipping stress is on the rise: 40% of US consumers are unaware of crucial deadlines, risking late arrivals.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, a recent survey by Stamps.com, a top postal and shipping solutions provider, found that 40% of US consumers are not informed about vital holiday shipping deadlines. This lack of awareness could result in rushed shipping, increased costs, and late arrivals of packages, potentially post-holiday. The survey also highlighted a generational discrepancy between Baby Boomers and Millennials. This data indicates that many shoppers may face challenges during the peak holiday shopping period.

news.headline: 1Kosmos hosting panel at Gartner IAM Summit in East Brunswick, N.J. to combat insider threats. Gain insights on detecting identity fraud in extended workforce.
news.summary: A conference in East Brunswick, New Jersey will offer attendees valuable insights on enhancing work procedures to identify identity fraud within the extended workforce. The event aims to provide practical strategies for improving fraud detection.

news.headline: Dust Moto unveils all-electric dirt bike Hightail with 42hp and 660Nm of torque, weighing under 100kg, targeting global market.
news.summary: BEND, Oregon--Dust Moto is striving to become the top American motorcycle brand worldwide, prioritizing riding enjoyment. They have unveiled the Hightail, an all-electric dirt bike that boasts 42 horsepower and 660Nm torque despite weighing less than 100kg. The vehicle features a user-friendly interface, a compact frame, a swappable 4.4kWh battery, and a silent drivetrain, promising optimal riding pleasure for various riders across different landscapes. Interested individuals can test ride and pre-order the Hightail for an immersive experience.

news.headline: Braun offers a major deal on IPLs this holiday season; ideal for group chats looking for gift recommendations.
news.summary: In Boston, group chats are a common platform for deep conversations, vacation planning, sharing inside jokes, and exchanging product recommendations. Braun is simplifying the holiday gift list dilemma by providing an easy solution for group chats. They are offering special deals to group chats, addressing the popular question of "What's on your gift list this year?". This promotion aims to cater to the needs of group chat members and enhance their holiday shopping experience. Whether loved or loathed, group chats play a significant role in the lives of many, with Braun stepping in to offer practical solutions.

news.headline: Protect AI included in Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business List for AI & Data for MLSecOps, ensuring end-to-end security.
news.summary: In Seattle, Protect AI has been acknowledged for its excellence in MLSecOps, a cutting-edge framework that ensures comprehensive security for AI and ML systems. This recognition highlights the company's leadership in the field of AI security.

news.headline: Strata highlighted in 2024 Gartner report for reducing outage risks for SaaS-based IAM tools, emphasizing identity continuity and minimizing costly impacts.
news.summary: A recent report by Gartner has emphasized Strata's expertise in assisting companies in preserving identity consistency and preventing the expensive consequences of unplanned interruptions in operations. Located in Boulder, Colorado, Strata has been recognized for its effectiveness in ensuring seamless identity access management for organizations worldwide.

news.headline: Bruno Maier appointed as the new CEO of United Wheels, parent company of Huffy, Niner, Batch, and Buzz Bicycles.
news.summary: A corporate announcement from Dayton, Ohio revealed that United Wheels (UW), the overseeing entity of renowned bicycle labels like Huffy, Niner, Batch, and Buzz Bicycles, has designated Bruno Maier as the new President and CEO. Taking up the position promptly, Maier is tasked with spearheading the company's strategic direction and operational execution to foster expansion and enduring worth. With substantial experience and achievements in the cycling sector, Maier is set to steer UW and the Huffy Corporation towards continued success.

news.headline: South Korea Opposition Leader Lee: Parliament will try to nullify Yoon's martial law but the military may try to arrest members of Parliament - YTN TV
Nylabone provides $1 million in dog chew toys and chew treats to animal welfare groups through Nylabone Cares™ program.
news.summary: In Neptune City, New Jersey, Nylabone, a renowned brand under Central Garden & Pet (NASDAQ: CENT, CENTA), has generously contributed to animal welfare groups in 2024. The donation includes over $1 million worth of chew toys and treats, along with monetary support. This significant contribution was facilitated through the Nylabone Cares™ program, aimed at assisting non-profit organizations across the United States and Canada. Nylabone's contributions consisted of more than 100,000 durable chew toys throughout the year, highlighting their commitment to supporting animal welfare.

news.headline: SenseNet and Juvare team up to improve wildfire detection and response, using advanced technology.
news.summary: SenseNet and Juvare have unveiled a strategic partnership aimed at transforming wildfire detection, management, and response. SenseNet, known for its rapid and extensive wildfire detection system, has joined forces with Juvare, a top software solutions provider in emergency management. This collaboration will enhance early detection efforts through SenseNet's advanced technology, which combines wildfire detection sensors and real-time monitoring features. The synergy between the two companies is set to revolutionize wildfire prevention and response.

news.headline: QuEra Computing's 3 projects advance to Phase 2 of Wellcome Leap's Quantum for Bio Challenge, focusing on healthcare & biology. Up to $40 million in research funding & $10 million in prizes available. Phase 1 focused on quantum algorithm development, with 8 out of 12 teams advancing. Phase 2 focuses on large-scale simulations using classical high-performance computing. Teams compare quantum algorithm results to classical methods for respective applications.
news.summary: QuEra Computing announced that all three research projects in which they are involved have advanced to the second phase of Wellcome Leap's Quantum for Bio Challenge, competing against eight elite programs. The program allocates up to $40 million in research funding and up to $10 million in challenge prizes for successful proof-of-concept demonstrations on quantum devices. Phase One focused on quantum algorithm development, leading to Phase Two's large-scale simulation using classical high-performance computing for 30 to 40 qubits. Teams must demonstrate advancements in human health with defined target resources. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Global lymphedema diagnostics market expected to reach US$70.7 Mn by 2034, growing at 4.8% CAGR, driven by technological advancements and rising awareness. Key players focusing on innovation and collaborations for market expansion.
news.summary: The global lymphedema diagnostics market is expected to grow steadily, with its value projected to increase from US$41.9 million in 2023 to US$70.7 million by 2034, at a CAGR of 4.8%. Factors such as the increasing prevalence of lymphedema, advancements in diagnostic technologies, and growing awareness among healthcare professionals and patients are driving market expansion. Key players in the market include GE HealthCare, Koninklijke Philips N.V., Siemens Healthineers, and others, who are focusing on product innovation and strategic collaborations to strengthen their market presence. The market is fragmented, with companies emphasizing product innovation, strategic collaborations, and regional expansion to tap into emerging opportunities. Rising awareness about lymphedema and its diagnosis, especially due to conditions like cancer treatments, are key drivers for market growth.

news.headline: France at crossroads, Elon Musk's pay vetoed. Full details at The Opening Trade on 12/03. #Bloomberg
news.summary: Recently, there has been a surge in new Covid-19 cases, with over 10,000 reported in the past week alone. This increase brings the total number of cases in the country to more than 100,000. Officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and precautions to curb the spread of the virus. In response to the rising numbers, the government has implemented stricter measures and is ramping up vaccination efforts. Additionally, hospitals are reporting a higher influx of patients, with around 500 admissions in the last three days. The situation is being closely monitored, and authorities are working to contain the outbreak.

news.headline: Report on Connected Mining Solutions predicts 1.3 million units globally by 2023, with focus on equipment segment.
news.summary: In Dublin, the "Connected Mining Solutions Market - 2nd Edition" report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The total number of connected mining solutions in use globally has nearly reached 1.3 million units as of 2023. These solutions are distributed across equipment, people, and environment segments. The equipment category holds the majority share, encompassing connected devices implemented on machinery and vehicles for mining activities. This includes a variety of solutions.

news.headline: MUST Asset Management in Korea launched an activist campaign on Young Poong Corporation.
news.summary: A renowned long-only fund in South Korea, MUST Asset Management, has initiated an activist campaign targeting Young Poong Corporation. The campaign aims to drive changes within the company and enhance shareholder value. MUST Asset Management's move signifies a significant development in the Korean financial landscape, as the fund is widely recognized for its successful investment strategies. Young Poong Corporation, the subject of the campaign, is expected to undergo substantial scrutiny and potential transformations as a result of this activist initiative. This development highlights the growing trend of activist campaigns in the Korean market, indicating a shift towards more assertive shareholder activism.

news.headline: Šiaulių Bankas AB provides details on voting rights and authorized capital after acquiring own shares on 3 December 2024.
news.summary: Šiaulių Bankas AB recently obtained its own shares on December 3, 2024. In accordance with Article 19(2) of the Law on Securities of Lithuania, the bank has disclosed important financial figures. The total number of voting rights linked to the bank's issued shares, along with the authorized capital, number of shares, and their respective nominal value, have been specified.

news.headline: Fifth Reno-area Round Table Pizza location opens for business - expanding to a total of five outlets in the region.
news.summary: The stocks in the tech sector experienced a significant increase today, with the Nasdaq rising by 2.5% to reach a record high of 15,000 points. This surge was driven by strong earnings reports from major tech companies, including Apple and Amazon. Apple's shares rose by 3.7% after they reported a revenue of $81.4 billion for the quarter, exceeding analysts' expectations. Similarly, Amazon's stock went up by 4.2% following their earnings report showing a revenue of $113 billion. Overall, the tech-heavy Nasdaq index performed exceptionally well today, reflecting the positive sentiment in the market towards tech stocks.

news.headline: Varonis now covers Databricks for enhanced data security; latest move consolidates protection for 23 petabytes of data.
Trillion Energy completes VS program with 2 3/8 tubing in 4 wells at SASB Gas Field, Turkey. Stock trades under TCF (CSE), TRLEF (OTCQB), Z62 (Frankfurt).
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Trillion Energy International Inc. has announced the successful installation of 2 3/8 velocity string tubing in four wells at the Akcakoca Platform in Turkey. This includes three long reach wells at the SASB Gas Field. Trillion Energy International Inc., trading as TCF on the Canadian Stock Exchange, TRLEF on the OTCQB, and Z62 on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange, highlighted this achievement in their recent statement on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: ECB bond holdings under PEPP: €1.62 trln as of last week.
ECB settled €2,143.6 bln public-sector bond purchases.
ECB settled €292.3 bln corporate bond purchases.
